calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal Of Plaintiffs Individual Claims With Prejudice And Dismissal Of Plaintiffs Class And Representative Claims Without Prejudice; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Iso
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR DISMISSAL OF INDIVIDUAL CLAIMS WITH PREJUDICE AND DISMISSAL OF CLASS AND REPRESENTATIVE CLAIMS WITHOUT PREJUDICE

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to dismiss plaintiffs' individual claims with prejudice and representative and class claims without prejudice is granted for good cause shown, to wit that there is a prior-filed PAGA action that covers the claims at issue in this case. Plaintiff's counsel is ordered to notify LWDA of the abandonment of the representative PAGA claims. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
